detaileddescription.para: How the geometry's Z values interact with the terrain elevation when computing the vertical position of every emitted vertex.

briefdescription.para: Coordinate reference system the geometry is expressed in.
The terrain provider used for geo-to-3D coordinate conversion.
Outline tube thickness in scene units.
Per-vertex color applied to the highlight mesh.
Extra vertical offset added on top of the elevation chosen by altitudeClamping.
Whether polygons get a semi-transparent fill in addition to the outline.
How the geometry's Z values are combined with the terrain elevation.

memberdef.argsstring: (double geoX, double geoY, double geometryZ) const
memberdef.name: vertexTo3D

briefdescription.para: Returns the terrain-relative scene-Y for geoX/geoY honoring altitudeClamping and the per-vertex geometryZ.
Walks an abstract geometry and returns its rings/lines as 3D paths.
Converts the vertices of lineString into a 3D scene-space path, dropping un-projectable points.
Resets the geometry buffers to an empty triangle mesh and triggers an update.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QByteArray &vertexData, const QByteArray &indexData, const QVector3D &minBound, const QVector3D &maxBound)
memberdef.name: finalize

briefdescription.para: Uploads vertexData and indexData and configures the vertex attributes.

detaileddescription.para: Generates 3D geometry for an identified or selected feature on top of the terrain mesh.

Points become spheres, lines become extruded tubes with sphere joints, and polygons get both an outline and a semi-transparent triangulated fill. The geometry is reprojected from the source CRS to the map CRS before being draped on the terrain surface.
